mapper.select:
SELECT stage.statusId, stage.statusName, stage.sort, stage.endStatus, stage.businessCount, stage.totalPrice FROM ( SELECT status.id AS statusId, status.name AS statusName, status.sort AS sort, NULL AS endStatus, COUNT(business.id) AS businessCount, COALESCE(SUM(business.total_price), 0) AS totalPrice FROM crm_business_status AS status LEFT JOIN crm_business AS business ON business.status_id = status.id AND business.status_type_id = status.type_id AND business.deleted = 0 AND business.owner_user_id IN
#{userId}
AND business.create_time BETWEEN #{times[0],javaType=java.time.LocalDateTime} AND #{times[1],javaType=java.time.LocalDateTime} WHERE status.deleted = 0 AND status.type_id = #{statusTypeId} GROUP BY status.id, status.name, status.sort
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL AS statusId, NULL AS statusName, 2147483640 + outcome.end_status AS sort, outcome.end_status AS endStatus, COUNT(business.id) AS businessCount, COALESCE(SUM(business.total_price), 0) AS totalPrice FROM ( SELECT 1 AS end_status UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 ) AS outcome LEFT JOIN crm_business AS business ON business.deleted = 0 AND business.status_type_id = #{statusTypeId} AND business.end_status = outcome.end_status AND business.owner_user_id IN
#{userId}
AND business.create_time BETWEEN #{times[0],javaType=java.time.LocalDateTime} AND #{times[1],javaType=java.time.LocalDateTime} GROUP BY outcome.end_status ) AS stage ORDER BY stage.sort, stage.statusId

SELECT daily.time, SUM(daily.forecastBusinessCount) AS forecastBusinessCount, SUM(daily.actualBusinessCount) AS actualBusinessCount, COALESCE(SUM(daily.forecastAmount), 0) AS forecastAmount, COALESCE(SUM(daily.actualAmount), 0) AS actualAmount FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(business.deal_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS time, COUNT(*) AS forecastBusinessCount, 0 AS actualBusinessCount, COALESCE(SUM(business.total_price), 0) AS forecastAmount, 0 AS actualAmount FROM crm_business AS business WHERE business.deleted = 0 AND business.end_status IS NULL AND business.deal_time IS NOT NULL AND business.owner_user_id IN
#{userId}
AND business.deal_time BETWEEN #{times[0],javaType=java.time.LocalDateTime} AND #{times[1],javaType=java.time.LocalDateTime} GROUP BY time
UNION ALL
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(business.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS time, 0 AS forecastBusinessCount, COUNT(*) AS actualBusinessCount, 0 AS forecastAmount, COALESCE(SUM(business.total_price), 0) AS actualAmount FROM crm_business AS business WHERE business.deleted = 0 AND business.end_status = 1 AND business.end_time IS NOT NULL AND business.owner_user_id IN
#{userId}
AND business.end_time BETWEEN #{times[0],javaType=java.time.LocalDateTime} AND #{times[1],javaType=java.time.LocalDateTime} GROUP BY time ) AS daily GROUP BY daily.time ORDER BY daily.time
